subject: CSIT tests for SO vCPE/OOF/HPA
commit_message:
CSIT tests for SO vCPE/OOF/HPA

adds SQL preload scripts about vCPE/infra, vbng, vbrgemu, vgmu to bypass asdc
based on https://gerrit.onap.org/r/p/demo.git Apr 25 2018

Change-Id: I0b893e683b1b5742ab09ba93503c007093a0eb6c
Issue-ID: SO-555
Signed-off-by: liboNet <libo.zhu@intel.com>
